verdict: A well-synced, energetic chart that captures the track's drive, let down only by an awkward one-sided eighth-note run during a hold.

issues.problem: Holding L while executing an 8th-note run (R -> U -> D) forces the player to perform an uncomfortable, fast one-foot movement entirely with the right foot.
Transitioning from a LD jump directly into a U tap can feel slightly jarring and cause minor double-stepping.
